Text:
Last night our volunteers gathered for the final briefing before the Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival 2026 opens its doors this evening.

Every person in this room is giving their time freely to make this festival happen, from running the bars and checking in casks, to welcoming guests and keeping everything ticking over across three days. Without them there is no festival. We are grateful to every single one of them.

Doors open tonight at 5pm. See you there.

https://hitchinbeerciderfestival.org.uk/
or visit the link in our bio.

4th to 6th June 2026
King George V Playing Fields, Old Hale Way, Hitchin, SG5 1XL

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #RealAle #RealCider #CAMRA #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent #VolunteerLed #CAMRAVolunteers

In partnership with CAMRA North Hertfordshire and Hitchin Rugby Club.
Alt text(s): Photo from inside the festival marquee at Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival 2026, showing rows of volunteers seated facing the Cider & Perry Bar during their final briefing the evening before the festival opens, with the bar signage and Campaign for Real Ale branding visible in the background
